title: thymus × citriodorus
intro: Thymus × citriodorus, also known as lemon thyme, is a hybrid plant derived from the combination of Thymus citriodorus and Thymus vulgaris. It is known for its citrusy fragrance and has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Thymus × citriodorus include reducing stress, promoting digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as its potential to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Thymus × citriodorus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, essential oils, and dried leaves, which can be consumed or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
